summary.text: 32-week pregnant patient who presented on 2026-06-01 with preeclampsia with severe features (BP 165/100, headache, epigastric pain) and was admitted on IV labetalol and magnesium. As of the most recent note (2026-06-03), blood pressure is well controlled at 124/80 on oral labetalol, symptoms have resolved, and repeat labs are reassuring; her preeclampsia is now without severe features (moderate) and she is clinically stable on outpatient-level monitoring.

_note: Offline demo (run with --mock). The older note says SEVERE; the newer says MODERATE/controlled. A correct summary reflects the most-current picture, so the recency guidance should keep the jury from penalizing it for 'disagreeing' with the older note.
